PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DEPOSITION RESPONSES - THE COURT ADOPTS THE RECOMMENDATION OF PRO TEM JUDGE WEIXEL AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN PART, AND DENIED, IN PART. MR. ALHANSHALI SHALL PROVIDE A SIGNATURE EXEMPLAR CREATED AT DEPOSITION AND THE DATE, TIME AND DURATION OF HIS DISCUSSIONS WITH HIS COUNSEL. THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE DOES NOT PROTECT INDEPENDENT FACTS RELATED TO A COMMUNICATION. MR. ALHANSHALI IS NOT REQUIRED TO ANSWER QUESTIONS REGARDING: (1) HIS CONVERSATIONS WITH THE PERSON SENT TO THE SCENE OF THE ACCIDENT; AND (2) THE REPORT THAT HE TESTIFIED ABOUT IN HIS DEPOSITION BECAUSE MR. ALHANSHALI NEVER SAW THE LUXOR CAB REPORT FOR AFTER HE WROTE IT. HAVING WITHDRAWN HIS OBJECTIONS, MR. ALHANSHALI SHALL RESPOND TO QUESTIONS CONCERNING HIS CONFERENCE WITH COUNSEL REGARDING THE PREPARATION OF DISCOVERY RESPONSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Deposition Responses
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAUREN TREMOR OF THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 421-2800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHEN DAHM OF CESARI, WARNER AND MORIARTY, TEL. NO. 391-1113 EXT. 12 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Deposition Responses - The court adopts the recommendation of Pro Tem Judge Weixel as follows: Granted in part, and denied, in part. Mr. Alhanshali shall provide a signature exemplar created at deposition and the date, time and duration of his discussions with his counsel. The attorney-client privilege does not protect independent facts related to a communication. Mr. Alhanshali is not required to answer questions regarding: (1) his conversations with the person sent to the scene of the accident; and (2) the report that he testified about in his deposition because Mr. Alhanshali never saw the Luxor Cab report for after he wrote it. Having withdrawn his objections, Mr. Alhanshali shall respond to questions concerning his conference with counsel regarding the preparation of discovery responses. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM
